articles.title: Maine Gov. Janet Mills drops U.S. Senate bid ahead of Democratic primary against Graham Platner
articles.description:
The two-term governor and longtime Maine politician was seen as one of Democrats' top 2026 recruits when she entered the Senate race last year. But Mills struggled to outshine first-time candidate Platner.

The post Maine Gov. Janet Mills drops U.S. Senate bid ahead of Democratic primary against Graham Platner appeared first on Boston.com.
